page_content:
Formerly: COMM398E.

COMM3398 Selected Topics in Communication (3 Credits) Topical study of contemporary issues in communication. Repeatable to: 12 credits if content differs.

COMM399 Honors Thesis (3 Credits)

Prerequisite: Permission of ARHU-Communication department. Restriction: Must be in Communication program.

Repeatable to: 6 credits if content differs.
